hooks.name: secret-scanner.sh
hooks.risk_reason: Regex patterns may produce false positives on legitimate env inspection commands.

hooks.name: edit-logger.sh
hooks.risk_reason: Observation-only; appends to a local log file with no external side effects.

hooks.name: commit-normalizer.sh
hooks.risk_reason: Only blocks git commit commands with non-conventional messages; well-scoped.

hooks.name: dry-run-injector.sh
hooks.risk_reason: Modifies destructive commands to add --dry-run; reduces risk rather than adding it.

summary: All hooks are well-scoped with clear purposes; no high-risk patterns detected.
